title: A Purer Source
content: 'But then, things changed. He stopped coming for the small stuff. He told me he found a 'purer source' — something the Syndicate only gives to people they own. He wasn't just chasing a high anymore; he was chasing a death wish.'||'I can tell you who his new supplier was, Detective. But information like that has a price. I have a shipment arriving at the docks tomorrow... I need a set of eyes that look like law enforcement to keep the paths clear. One hand washes the other, right?'
